debug_info.goal:
a : Type
⊢ ∀ (sl : SymList a), sl.fromSL.reverse = SymList.fromSL (Chapter3.SymList.reverse a sl)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  intro sl
  cases sl with
  | mk as bs h =>
  -- We need to show that the reverse of `bs ++ as` is the same as the `fromSL` of the reversed symmetric list.
  -- The reversed symmetric list has `as` and `bs` swapped, so we need to show the lists are the same.
  simp [List.reverse_append, List.reverse_reverse]
  <;>
  (try simp_all [SymList.mk.injEq]) <;>
  (try simp_all [List.reverse_append, List.reverse_reverse, List.append_assoc]) <;>
  (try omega) <;>
  (try aesop)
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [SymList.mk.injEq, List.reverse_append, List.reverse_reverse, List.append_assoc]
    <;>
    omega
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [SymList.mk.injEq, List.reverse_append, List.reverse_reverse, List.append_assoc]
    <;>
    aesop
  })
